query: SELECT s.ticker, s.ytdStartPrice as stocks_ytd, h.close as historical_close FROM stocks s LEFT JOIN historicalPrices h ON s.ticker = h.ticker AND h.date = '2024-12-31' WHERE s.ticker = 'SGKN.SW' LIMIT 1
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w4G5FWonHi6U6L.root --database aQvizP6Ne8LKEmBGrk5vq4 --execute SELECT s.ticker, s.ytdStartPrice as stocks_ytd, h.close as historical_close FROM stocks s LEFT JOIN historicalPrices h ON s.ticker = h.ticker AND h.date = '2024-12-31' WHERE s.ticker = 'SGKN.SW' LIMIT 1
